A Servant's Heart

Warrior Spirit Companion

A private place to talk, reflect, and stay connected to the strength, service, and whole-person wellness at the heart of Warrior Spirit.

Powered by The Wizard Nexus's PreCrisis.ai

Talk with the Companion Write a Reflection

Why Warrior Spirit has a Companion

Support should still be within reach between programs, conversations, and hard days.

Warrior Spirit helps veterans, first responders, people in recovery, educators, youth, and their families build connection, resilience, purpose, and practical skills. The Companion carries that spirit into a private space where you can put thoughts into words.

It is here to help you reflect and prepare for the next human conversation. It does not replace Warrior Spirit's people, qualified care, crisis services, or the relationships that help communities heal and grow.

How the Companion gets to know you

You choose what it learns by choosing what you share.

Start with your name and the kind of personality you want in Profile. As you talk, the Companion can save concise memories about useful, lasting context—your goals, preferences, projects, relationships, and the things that matter to you.

Reflection is also your space to simply write. When you save one, it stays on this device and a bounded reflection memory helps the Companion understand what has been happening in your life the next time you talk.

Your Companion, your choice

Choose the support that feels right for you.

The Warrior Spirit Companion can use Cloud AI today, and it is built to support local PreCrisis AI and the dedicated Warrior Spirit AI. Whichever option supports you, the Companion remains the same familiar, private place to talk and reflect.

Warrior Spirit AI is a local AI designed to run right on your own computer. It is currently being finalized and will be available soon. Until then, add your Warrior Spirit AI Licence key in Profile to use Cloud AI with the Companion.

Set up your Profile

Immediate human support

You do not have to face a crisis alone.

This Companion is not an emergency service and does not monitor messages. In the United States, call or text 988. Veterans and service members can call 988 and press 1, or text 838255. If someone is in immediate danger, call 911.

01CompanionTalk through what is happening, one question at a time. 02Mental Health CenterReview private Companion check-ins, progress charts, and notes. 03ReflectionWrite and save private reflections on this device. 04Memories & DataExplore Companion conversations, reflections, memories, reports, and notes. 05ProfileSet your name, AI personality, Warrior Spirit AI Licence key, and voice.

Five paths, one mission

Meet you where you are

Warrior Spirit supports veterans, educators, young people, people in recovery, and first responders through practical, human-centered programs.

Stored only here

Your records stay on this device.

  • Companion conversations, reflections, memories, profile information, reports, scores, and notes are saved in the Warrior Spirit application-data folder on this device.
  • They are isolated from PreCrisis and other Arcane apps and are not synchronized to Warrior Spirit or The Wizard Nexus. Clearing Warrior Spirit application data can permanently remove them.
  • Companion and reflection content is sent to the configured AI provider when AI features run.
  • Your Warrior Spirit AI Licence key is stored locally with your on-device Warrior Spirit profile and is not synchronized by this app.
